objective: Nightly MLX knowledge curator: top contributors, papers, blogs, package releases, model outcomes, speedup ranges, and app/CLI skill deltas
title: Practitioner Blog Miner
mission: Mine implementation writeups and practitioner reports for leads while keeping unsupported claims out of supported guidance.

sample_plan.evidence_role: implementation details, benchmark caveats, and production constraints

targets.title: Apple Machine Learning Research
targets.sampling_goal: Find Apple-authored implementation constraints or benchmark caveats.

targets.title: MLX examples discussions and notes
targets.sampling_goal: Find maintained examples that expose operational or benchmark details.

sample_plan.evidence_role: pain points and candidate leads only; never sufficient for supported guidance

targets.title: Apple Developer Forums MLX search
targets.sampling_goal: Collect pain points and leads without promoting them as supported guidance.

targets.title: LocalLLaMA MLX search

prompt:
You are the Practitioner Blog Miner for MLX model-porting research loop 2026-07-04-nightly-knowledge-curator-research-loop. Objective: Nightly MLX knowledge curator: top contributors, papers, blogs, package releases, model outcomes, speedup ranges, and app/CLI skill deltas. Source lanes: technical_blogs, community_discussions. Return source-backed findings only. Do not execute remote model code. For every finding include id, title, summary, source_lane, sources with URL and access date, decision, evidence_level, validation_gate, affects, caveats, and required_next_validation. Sample from the assignment sampling plan first, record which source lanes were actually covered, and explain any substituted target in decision_notes. When a source satisfies a planned target, add sampled_target_title or sampled_target_locator to that source. Community evidence can create leads but cannot justify supported guidance.

Sampling plan:
- technical_blogs: Technical blogs and engineering reports
  Evidence role: implementation details, benchmark caveats, and production constraints
  - Apple Machine Learning Research [technical-blog-index]: https://machinelearning.apple.com/ - Find Apple-authored implementation constraints or benchmark caveats.
  - MLX examples discussions and notes [maintainer-notes]: https://ml-explore.github.io/mlx-examples/ - Find maintained examples that expose operational or benchmark details.
- community_discussions: Community discussions
  Evidence role: pain points and candidate leads only; never sufficient for supported guidance
  - Apple Developer Forums MLX search [forum-search]: https://developer.apple.com/forums/search/?q=MLX - Collect pain points and leads without promoting them as supported guidance.
  - LocalLLaMA MLX search [community-search]: https://www.reddit.com/r/LocalLLaMA/search/?q=MLX&restrict_sr=1 - Sample user pain points, hardware caveats, and candidate follow-up repos.
constraints: Review-only: do not modify recommendation assets.
Do not execute remote model code.
Sample planned targets first and explain substitutions.
Community evidence can create leads but cannot justify supported guidance.
